text: How would you describe your energy level right now?
choices: Wired — I could keep going for hours

text: How does your screen time tonight make you feel?
Will staying up another hour be worth it tomorrow morning?
choices: Yes, I have a good reason

text: As a percentage, how much better do people who sleep 8 hours do on memory tests than those who sleep for 6 hours?
Roughly how many hours does the average American sleep a night?
